name: EMILY's List
subject: One last thing before bed >>
body:
|
---
| | [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6706/24c69fd9/a41fca4c/189b1e49/1434942439/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170828_email_August-EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=WQEFE864N_digital_email_20170831_EOMLightsOut_inact&source=WQEFE864N_digital_email_20170831_EOMLightsOut_inact") [](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6706/24c69fd9/a41fca4c/189b1e4a/1434942439/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170828_email_August-EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=WQEFE864N_digital_email_20170831_EOMLightsOut_inact&source=WQEFE864N_digital_email_20170831_EOMLightsOut_inact")

# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6706/24c69fd9/a41fca4c/189b1e4b/1434942439/VEsF/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE864N_digital_email_20170831_EOMLightsOut_inact&source=WQEFE864N_digital_email_20170831_EOMLightsOut_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6706/24c69fd9/a41fca4c/189b1e44/1434942439/VEsC/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE864N_digital_email_20170831_EOMLightsOut_inact&source=WQEFE864N_digital_email_20170831_EOMLightsOut_inact"). Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Debbie=E2=80=99s_iPad?=
subject: 3 hours to midnight (please read before tomorrow)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| I'm in awe at the response, friends! We reached out to you earlier today to see if you would help us close the gap before midnight. Our deadline is tonight and I am getting worried. I just heard back from our finance director, and we are SO CLOSE to hitting our goal! [_**All we need are 8 people to step up and make a contribution before midnight. Don 't worry; this is the last time we'll ask -- will you rush in $5 or $10 and help us hit our goal?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e36/622b7b5b/5bae9a0/307bd9bc/7406763/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170831pm3?refcode=dwse170831pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=5") | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e36/622b7b5b/5bae9a0/307bd9bc/7406763/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170831pm3?refcode=dwse170831pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
Alright, I won't keep you any longer. I know we've been sending a lot of messages. Just know that your continued support means the world to me.
Debbie
Sent from my iPad
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e36/622b7b5b/5bae9a0/307bd9bf/7406763/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Team, I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Team, I'll get right to it. We've got 4 hours to go until the FEC deadline and we need your help.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170831-Schumer-ProsHV-V2&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team --

I'm a goal-oriented guy.

I trust my team, but I want people to tell me where things stand.

And because I'm guessing a few of you share that quality, I wanted to give you a quick update.

As of a few moments ago, we're still $16,340 away from hitting our August fundraising goal -- and the FEC deadline is only 4 hours away.

[**So before tonight 's FEC deadline, I'm asking you to chip in $1.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170831-Schumer-ProsHV-V2&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

This is pretty simple.

If 1,000 people step up in the next few hours, we'll be in great shape -- because every contribution between now and midnight will be triple-matched.

You're one of our best supporters, so I know I can count on you.

**Will you make a donation right now?**

[**http://www.dscc.org/democrats-fight-back**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170831-Schumer-ProsHV-V2&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Chuck

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d874/2b07114c/56a8712/73130747/1715185094/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d874/2b07114c/56a8712/73130746/1715185094/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d874/2b07114c/56a8712/73130741/1715185094/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
There's still time to get your gift TRIPLE-MATCHED, team! But the match -- and the FEC deadline -- ends at midnight >>

[ ](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170831-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

This is our last email, team.

We are closing our books on our August FEC deadline at midnight. And as of now, **we need just $6,372 to make our goal** and stop Trump from gaining any ground in the Senate.

name: Trump Headquarters
subject: your favorite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
The President asked for your input on this... |
---
| | |

Peter,

Over the last 7 months, President Trump has accomplished so much.

-> Ensured the confirmation of Conservative Justice Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court
-> Secured our country with a 50% decrease in illegal border crossings at the southern border
-> Eliminated hundreds of regulations that will result in millions of dollars in savings
-> Taken aggressive and substantial steps in the fight against ISIS
-> Added over one million new jobs to the U.S. economy

**And he 's just getting started.**

Now, the President has asked for your input on what you care about most and what you want to see more of in the future. **[To share your thoughts, please take our Official Accomplishment Poll today.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78e86ef2f9367d84f22b6c874c04c055a4d1b757a1067550e16a786b2936cda0f373c48a0bc2133daeafa0284d14d7f3)** [TAKE THE OFFICIAL POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78e86ef2f9367d8462b713820e9ce9566e3a5439085a656d1495c4e69786a1579f4a69edc74eb632a483b58b15f13463)
We're looking to send a report on first responses by 11:59 PM TONIGHT, so please be sure to pass this email along and take the survey to be one of the first names in front of the President.Thank you,

Team TRUMP
[TAKE THE OFFICIAL POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78e86ef2f9367d84e4548dd9eb86cab628c86aeef8621f21f52a6a288778b498602ce6939c3c4f3fbefb017e7b65a2d3)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78e86ef2f9367d8487d7e63fc20488f2e134bf353e367530986c3f16ae0a4849b8ba2663a2ca00be6f42b292dc44fa98) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=78e86ef2f9367d84ffebc6045273049af5f50b57764bfc35227b83df4cc164cac93a72adf9bf3218421e07de04bbbe9b) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab544e4e9e94460399ca9fba1474b33c535f3062b8b29bb362bfcfd6346cf8e5342c102b9a8aa2d7ff) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846dd7db58ab74b1288573dfaf4b4110aaf9925ddeb3053010b)
---

name: The White House
subject: The President's Weekly Address
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=dc8b6847dc1ab9aec6876775d113aa36a2e55a0645687e667905355456570c833d1487bfa8c294980f9ab3eebdca4a85f8e8b0ae78d1afd1

The President's Weekly Address

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=dc8b6847dc1ab9ae8eb57d6617d0c7c26e421f0de37e897ac4e4ddacd53135ad0404c6cff8b5b4a5bdef396a048b90ee45045eee611f949c

-------------

All American Hearts Are with the People of Texas and Louisiana

"All American hearts are with the people of Texas and Louisiana. We mourn and pray and struggle through the hardships -- together.
We know that a long and difficult path lies ahead to get our neighbors back in their homes and on their feet. But we also know that we are stronger than the obstacles in our path. Arm-in-arm, we will strive, we will endure, and we will emerge stronger than ever before."
-President Donald J. Trump

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=dc8b6847dc1ab9ae0760ebb0f8b58ee0419932a72194fbc10a035a01415b825ca78d328da6f36f5023b99a33d15858d7b6ed986aba4b69a3
Watch the President's Weekly Address

Vice President Pence and Mrs. Pence Meet with Hurricane Harvey Survivors and Volunteers

Yesterday, Vice President Pence, Mrs. Pence, and five Cabinet secretaries traveled to southeast Texas to meet with Hurricane Harvey survivors and survey damage.

"On behalf of the American people, with the leadership of President Donald Trump to the people of Texas, we are with you today. We will be with you tomorrow, and we will be with you every day until this great state and these great communities recover and rebuild to be even better and stronger than ever before."
-Vice President Pence

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=dc8b6847dc1ab9aeff38ad15719d191901bc218247dca12d1265eee6fb4910006dbdfdb9c216ccac6c0d9caf625fd28cc4f09c9efd56cd0d
Watch the video

Update on Hurricane Harvey Relief Efforts from Homeland Security Advisor

Yesterday, Homeland Security Advisor Tom Bossert gave an update on Hurricane Harvey relief efforts.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=dc8b6847dc1ab9ae7cf468c3d2f1daffd908fb6de3718265b3d7826ae26c31ec2533e089e929a1421fc887930c40be81bb2e3a0192795824
Watch the video

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump participates in a briefing on Hurricane Harvey's recovery efforts | August 31, 2017 (Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen)

Coming Up

Today, the President will receive an update from disaster relief organizations on Hurricane Harvey recovery efforts.

On Saturday, the President and the First Lady will return to Texas as part of the ongoing Hurricane Harvey relief efforts.

White House Spring Internship

The application for the Spring 2018 White House Internship Program is open!
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=dc8b6847dc1ab9ae19ddefadf476a86a2cda84cf23ef4805a39fffe7331d658e1c1926f6aa623a53949f2842e881226317d5f0580b8b0e3b
Apply here

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=dc8b6847dc1ab9aec3bf0b4033b408e7644c47161f17d615349592607cdde4d3e4f6854833a58901ef8fdf910a94c03d4ec38d0c239cbc62
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=dc8b6847dc1ab9aef93c8514071662202fe86b1ff24c0188e9e539f508a55833ec69cb42fb5be4b78a886e1ca5ea6f2052d0849942189972
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4c3ed9acb16ef1ba5afb5336382412da4173d886fbde3a1920e3e7f166354c759e414eba2c0fdd6b9095c9a88b691f2ce
Unsubscribe

But we also know that we are stronger than the obstacles in our path. Arm-in-arm, we will strive, we will endure, and we will emerge stronger than ever before." -President Donald J. Trump Watch the President's Weekly Address Vice President Pence and Mrs. Pence Meet with Hurricane Harvey Survivors and Volunteers Yesterday, Vice President Pence, Mrs. Pence, and five Cabinet secretaries traveled to southeast Texas to meet with Hurricane Harvey survivors and survey damage. "On behalf of the American people, with the leadership of President Donald Trump to the people of Texas, we are with you today. We will be with you tomorrow, and we will be with you every day until this great state and these great communities recover and rebuild to be even better and stronger than ever before." -Vice President Pence Watch the video Update on Hurricane Harvey Relief Efforts from Homeland Security Advisor Yesterday, Homeland Security Advisor Tom Bossert gave an update on Hurricane Harvey relief efforts. Watch the video Photo of the Day President Donald J. Trump participates in a briefing on Hurricane Harvey's recovery efforts | August 31, 2017 (Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen) Coming Up Today, the President will receive an update from disaster relief organizations on Hurricane Harvey recovery efforts. On Saturday, the President and the First Lady will return to Texas as part of the ongoing Hurricane Harvey relief efforts. White House Spring Internship The application for the Spring 2018 White House Internship Program is open! Apply here

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Let's keep Mark on the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

With all the chaos caused by the Trump Administration, it's never been more important to have public servants who will protect our rights and enforce the law.

Virginia is fortunate to have Mark Herring as Attorney General. He is a courageous leader, and I'm proud to support him as he seeks reelection. **[Will you show your support, too, by pitching in to his campaign?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=s%2FPsPR%2B73%2BxugZmTsukDjbPW3f5B5TAm)**

With Mark in office, Virginia has led on protecting civil rights, ensuring equality, and defending our environment. When President Trump implemented his discriminatory Muslim ban, Mark filed a lawsuit to protect the rights of our neighbors -- a decision borne out by multiple court wins.

Mark also argued successfully that Virginia's ban on same-sex marriage violated the U.S. Constitution. He determined that DREAMers could qualify for an affordable college education in Virginia. And he has strongly defended Virginia's plan to clean up the Chesapeake Bay.

Even before that, as a state senator, Mark consistently received 100% ratings from Planned Parenthood, NARAL Pro-Choice Virginia, and Equality Virginia for defending and advancing Virginians' basic rights.

**I don 't know exactly what the next four years will bring -- none of us do -- but I feel better knowing Mark is on the job, fighting for Virginians every day. Will you help me make sure he wins reelection and continues to work for us? [Please pitch in to his campaign today.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ju8Vt0Szfc5XqXbySvlYp7PW3f5B5TAm)**

Thanks,

Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RPSY6YVkViYwSaC9T5LTx7PW3f5B5TAm)
---
| In connection with this mailer, we are soliciting only donations of up to $2,700 from individuals and up to $5,000 from multi-candidate political committees. We are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks in connection with this mailer.

Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HILp452GHX%2BGnR1CKugxBrPW3f5B5TAm).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Sen. Chris Van Hollen
subject: Thank you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I want to thank you for your support ahead of yesterday's FEC fundraising deadline and update you on the fights ahead.
---
[****](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d879/2b07114c/1a2008d7/73130b24/2342923807/VEsH/ "http://www.redcross.org/")
Team,

First, I want to thank you for all of your support ahead of yesterday's FEC fundraising deadline.

Thanks to supporters like you, Senate Democrats will be in a strong position when the Senate returns to session on Tuesday -- and that's important, because we face another tough fight ahead.

Right now, Donald Trump is threatening to shut down the government if Congress refuses to fund his costly border wall.

Time and time again, President Trump has said Mexico would pay for the wall. Now he wants taxpayers to foot the bill for a $70 billion wall that they didn't ask for and won't work.

It's reckless and unprecedented for the President of the United States to shut down the government if he doesn't get his way.

When the Republicans imposed a government shutdown in 2013 as part of an unsuccessful effort to defund Obamacare, it cost our country billions of dollars and thousands of jobs. Shutting down the government this year would be another costly, self-inflicted wound that hurts all Americans.

Senate Democrats will be fighting our hardest to prevent President Trump from following through on this outrageous threat to willfully cause harm with a government shutdown -- and we'll need you standing with us.

My Senate colleagues and I are grateful for your continued support this week and thankful that we can count on you to stand with us in the important fights ahead.

Onwards,

Sen. Chris Van Hollen

P.S. So many of you have already helped with Hurricane Harvey recovery efforts. You can keep up with some of the good work being done for the recovery efforts [**here**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d879/2b07114c/1a2008d7/73130b24/2342923807/VEsE/ "http://www.redcross.org/").

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d879/2b07114c/1a2008d7/73130b27/2342923807/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d879/2b07114c/1a2008d7/73130b26/2342923807/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d879/2b07114c/1a2008d7/73130b21/2342923807/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We are going to run Medicare for all like a campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Change never happens from inside of Washington, D.C. Certainly not with this president and not with this Congress.
No, real change always comes from our communities and the grassroots. That's what the history of America is all about. It's the story of the trade union movement, the women's movement, the civil rights movement, the gay rights movement and it's why we have $15 minimum wage happening all over the country.
Because when people get organized and fight for real change, the people win. But when we are silent, the powerful almost always prevail.
So in two weeks, I am going to introduce our Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care legislation. We're going to put together a grassroots movement that organizes people in all parts of this country much like we did during the presidential race.
There will be rallies, buttons, bumper stickers, shirts and most importantly people organizing in their communities across the country. This is not going to be a quick or easy fight. We'll be taking on the insurance companies, the drug companies, Wall Street and all those who make billions in profit from the current dysfunctional system. I cannot do this alone, and I need your help to fund this work:
**[Can I count on you to donate $3 toward our campaign to advance legislation that will do what every other major country on earth has done?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-campaign?refcode=em170901-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-campaign?refcode=em170901-full")**
Yes. We must join the rest of the industrialized world and guarantee health care to all as a right, not a privilege.
Today in America, despite the important advances made because of the Affordable Care Act, 29 million Americans still have no health insurance and even more are insured with outrageously high copayments and deductibles. Further, with Americans paying the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs, many cannot afford to fill the prescriptions their doctors write.
Enough is enough! I am here to tell you that a nation cannot survive morally or economically when so few have so much and so many are struggling to get by. A great and decent nation is not one in which "survival of the fittest" reigns. It is not one in which greed is rampant. We must fight to create a nation where we care for each other, and protect the most vulnerable among us. We cannot give tax breaks to billionaires and large corporations while people are dying because they can't afford to get to to a doctor or buy the medicine they need. We cannot allow insurance and drug companies to make obscene profits when families go broke because of outrageously high medical bills.
Our Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care legislation will change that. Not only will it guarantee health care for all people, it will save middle class families and small businesses significant sums of money. It will create a health care system designed to provide quality health care for all in a cost-effective way, not one designed to make billions for powerful special interests.
The campaign to pass Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care is going to be powered by people like you. People who believe that Americans who cannot afford health care don't deserve to die. So that's why I have to ask:
[**Can I count on you to donate $3 toward our campaign to advance and pass a Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care system in this country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-campaign?refcode=em170901-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-campaign?refcode=em170901-full")
If we are still serious about transforming our country, if we are serious about rebuilding the middle class, we need to develop a political movement which is prepared to take on and defeat a ruling class whose greed is destroying our nation.
Through this campaign to pass Medicare for all, we are going to do something people remember decades from today. I am sure of it. But I am just as sure that it will only happen if we are all in this fight together.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-campaign?refcode=em170901-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-campaign?refcode=em170901-full")****
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Hoosiers Helping Houston
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
**_Hoosiers Helping Houston -[Make a Contribution Today](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a6ed210b71&e=1acd9bb3d6)_**
How can we help? It's a question I have been asking myself as I've watched Hurricane Harvey devastate Houston, Texas. Having briefly traveled from Indiana to Louisiana to assist in recovery efforts just days after Hurricane Katrina hit the Gulf Coast, I have seen devastation like this before and I knew we needed to help.

So, to do our part, the Indiana Republican Party has partnered with our friends at [**Hoosiers Helping Houston**](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dbbf6ebc12&e=1acd9bb3d6), a local organization that formed immediately following Hurricane Harvey making landfall, and the **American Red Cross** to help our fellow Americans in Texas.

There are two ways that you can make an immediate impact:
* _**The Basic Necessities:**_ The Red Cross has identified these items as the most important - bottled water, diapers, baby wipes, juice (non-glass) and snacks (with an expiration date AFTER 9/30/17). If you are willing to donate any of these items, please bring them to the **Indiana Republican Party Headquarters** at 101 W. Ohio St Suite 2200 **no later than** Friday, September 7th at Noon. We will handle getting your items to one of four drop-off points set up in Indianapolis.
* _**Monetary Contributions**_ : We have set up a [special contribution page](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7fd78dfe73&e=1acd9bb3d6) for those interested in donating directly to the cause. [Every penny you donate through this link](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aec8b3bab9&e=1acd9bb3d6) will be given to the American Red Cross to assist their efforts in Texas.

On behalf of the Indiana Republican Party, Hoosiers Helping Houston and the American Red Cross, thank you for anything and everything you can do to help. Our friends in Texas need our assistance now. Let's step up and show them we care.
\- Kyle Hupfer
|
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
| Governor **Eric Holcomb** did his part to help those affected by Hurricane Harvey when he [authorized sending State of Indiana](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e5ebbf93ae&e=1acd9bb3d6) personnel and assets to the region. "When another state is devastated by a natural disaster," Governor Holcomb said, "Indiana is committed to providing resources to help response and recovery efforts. We are ready when called to serve and respond." It's Hoosier Hospitality at its finest.

Also this week, Governor Holcomb welcomed yet [another high-ranking federal government official](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dafa0c037d&e=1acd9bb3d6) to the Hoosier State when Secretary of Transporation **Elaine Chao** paid us a visit up north to discuss partnering with Indiana to improve the South Shore and to [cut the ribbon on the 80/90 Push Project](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=abade0ffc4&e=1acd9bb3d6). She was the fifth Trump Administration official to visit Indiana in the month of August after Secretary Dr. **Ben Carson** , Secretary **Sonny Perdue** , EPA Administrator **Scott Pruitt** and Vice President **Mike Pence** all came by to say hello (and see how we do things in the Hoosier State - although the Vice President was already well versed on that topic!)

You can also read an op-ed from Governor Holcomb on the Next Level Jobs program that is helping Hoosiers learn the skills they need to take their work to the next level by clicking [here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e847e7b830&e=1acd9bb3d6) and his take on making Indiana the "Crossroads of the Universe" by clicking [here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1d6847005f&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| **News You Can Use**
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[visited the Farm Progress Show in Illinois](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c1ba262388&e=1acd9bb3d6) & [walked in Lincoln's footsteps](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7f132bc5be&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Connie Lawson**[met a 105-year old Wabash County resident who hasn't missed an election](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=67d8934bf4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [held the last event of her INvestABLE launch tour in Fort Wayne](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ec6dd8f7a7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz**[talks to the NW Indiana Times about more transparency in government data](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3b07a943a0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young** [delivered the keynote at a U.S. Global Leadership Coalition event in Indy](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb8fed18cb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski's** [highlights the need for federal tax reform](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b2e61b1324&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [met with constituents during a 'Coffee with Your Congressman' event](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c256f99c8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[visited NSWC Crane](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fe484dcfcb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Events Calendar**
[Saturday,September 9](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3d3010d623&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Annual State Rep. Randy Frye Picnic
[Sunday, September 10](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eaeecc6c2f&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- 6th Annual Johnson County GOP Chairman's Rally & Cookout
[Thursday, September 14](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2120cecc90&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Fishers Mayor Scott Fadness Event
[Friday, September 15](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=13d13ae8e8&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Delaware County Lincoln Day with former Congressman David McIntosh
[Saturday, September 16](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d15b4a297&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Dearborn County Men's Club Picnic
[Wednesday, September 20](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b4ce4fa37&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Auditor Tera Klutz Campaign Kick-Off
[Saturday, October 7](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff24c46b37&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- 8th District Candidate Training Seminar
[Thursday, October 12](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1ee3eaad85&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Jay County Republican Party Lincoln Day with Sen. Todd Young

clean_body: | | | | | | Hoosiers Helping Houston - How can we help? It's a question I have been asking myself as I've watched Hurricane Harvey devastate Houston, Texas. Having briefly traveled from Indiana to Louisiana to assist in recovery efforts just days after Hurricane Katrina hit the Gulf Coast, I have seen devastation like this before and I knew we needed to help. So, to do our part, the Indiana Republican Party has partnered with our friends at , a local organization that formed immediately following Hurricane Harvey making landfall, and the American Red Cross to help our fellow Americans in Texas. There are two ways that you can make an immediate impact: The Basic Necessities: The Red Cross has identified these items as the most important - bottled water, diapers, baby wipes, juice (non-glass) and snacks (with an expiration date AFTER 9/30/17). If you are willing to donate any of these items, please bring them to the Indiana Republican Party Headquarters at 101 W. Ohio St Suite 2200 no later than Friday, September 7th at Noon. We will handle getting your items to one of four drop-off points set up in Indianapolis. Monetary Contributions : We have set up a for those interested in donating directly to the cause. will be given to the American Red Cross to assist their efforts in Texas. On behalf of the Indiana Republican Party, Hoosiers Helping Houston and the American Red Cross, thank you for anything and everything you can do to help. Our friends in Texas need our assistance now. Let's step up and show them we care. \- Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Governor Eric Holcomb did his part to help those affected by Hurricane Harvey when he personnel and assets to the region. "When another state is devastated by a natural disaster," Governor Holcomb said, "Indiana is committed to providing resources to help response and recovery efforts. We are ready when called to serve and respond." It's Hoosier Hospitality at its finest. Also this week, Governor Holcomb welcomed yet to the Hoosier State when Secretary of Transporation Elaine Chao paid us a visit up north to discuss partnering with Indiana to improve the South Shore and to . She was the fifth Trump Administration official to visit Indiana in the month of August after Secretary Dr. Ben Carson , Secretary Sonny Perdue , EPA Administrator Scott Pruitt and Vice President Mike Pence all came by to say hello (and see how we do things in the Hoosier State - although the Vice President was already well versed on that topic!) You can also read an op-ed from Governor Holcomb on the Next Level Jobs program that is helping Hoosiers learn the skills they need to take their work to the next level by clicking and his take on making Indiana the "Crossroads of the Universe" by clicking . | | News You Can Use Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch & Secretary of State Connie Lawson Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Senator Todd Young Congresswoman Jackie Walorski's Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Trey Hollingsworth Events Calendar \- Annual State Rep. Randy Frye Picnic \- 6th Annual Johnson County GOP Chairman's Rally & Cookout \- Fishers Mayor Scott Fadness Event \- Delaware County Lincoln Day with former Congressman David McIntosh \- Dearborn County Men's Club Picnic \- Auditor Tera Klutz Campaign Kick-Off \- 8th District Candidate Training Seminar \- Jay County Republican Party Lincoln Day with Sen.
